name: Polygon News → Grok Sentiment → Signal State Machine v5.13

nodes.name: Watchlist and Config
nodes.notes: Edit tickers, thresholds and API keys here. No code changes needed.

nodes.name: Polygon News per Ticker
nodes.notes: Requires Polygon Starter plan ($29/mo). Free tier returns 403 on this endpoint.

nodes.name: Kill Signal Threshold
nodes.notes: Only passes if score ≤ threshold (default -0.75) AND Grok response parsed successfully.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  ticker:           $json.ticker,
  timeframe:        'D',
  execution:        'SELL',
  signal:           'BEARISH',
  alert_type:       'SENTIMENT_AGENT',
  bias_score:       '20',
  adx:              'N/A',
  rsi:              'N/A',
  macd_hist:        'N/A',
  atr:              '0',
  volume_ratio:     '0',
  vix:              '25',
  gap_pct:          '0',
  spy_price:        '0',
  spy_change_pct:   '0',
  spy_status:       'NEUTRAL',
  daily_dd_pct:     '0',
  daily_dd_halt:    'false',
  vix_size_mult:    '1.0',
  eff_position_size:'5',
  vix_stop_mult:    '1.15',
  momentum_engine:  'false',
  momentum_type:    'sentiment_agent',
  _sentiment_kill:  'true',
  sentiment_score:  $json.sentiment_score,
  sentiment_reason: $json.sentiment_reason,
  comment:          'SENTIMENT_AGENT | ' + $json.source + ' | ' + $json.title.substring(0, 100)
} }}

nodes.name: POST Kill to Signal State Machine
nodes.notes: Fires the SENTIMENT kill path in SM v5.13. Requires _sentiment_kill, sentiment_score, and sentiment_reason.

nodes.name: Telegram Personal Log
nodes.notes: Optional. Sends to personal Telegram (REDACTED_CHAT_ID) only. Remove if not needed.

main.node: POST Kill to Signal State Machine

meta.description: Polygon News → Grok Sentiment pipeline. Scans 105 tickers every 10 min for news via Polygon API, runs sentiment analysis through Grok-3, applies sentiment kill threshold (-0.75), sends alerts to SM webhook and Telegram.
meta.restore_notes: Replace REDACTED_* placeholders with real credentials after import.
